name: Asia Cuanon Technology (Shanghai) Co., Ltd.
summary: Asia Cuanon Technology (Shanghai) Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, manufacture, and service of functional architectural coatings, thermal insulation decorative panels and materials, and fire insulation products in China. The company also provides paint engineering coatings, plasters, tile adhesives, and interior wall and external wall insulation products. Its products are used in real estate, residential community, hotel/office, and public construction projects. The company is headquartered in Shanghai, China.
